channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Web3 Dev Uncovered
item.description: Unlock Web3 development secrets: costs, skills, and tools required to build decentralized apps and succeed in the ecosystem.

item.title: Code or Not (April 2026)
item.description: Decide between No-Code and Code: get clarity on when to use each for efficient project execution.

item.title: Data Showdown: Warehouse, Lake, or Lakehouse?
item.description: Compare data warehouses, lakes, and lakehouses to find the best fit for your analytics needs. Uncover key features, benefits, and use cases in this insightful showdown.

item.title: How Developers Are Using AI to 10x Their Output: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: A practical guide to How Developers Are Using AI to 10x Their Output covering implementation, real performance benchmarks, common mistakes, and honest tradeoffs.

item.description: A practical guide to VS Code Setup That Makes You 2x Faster covering implementation, real performance benchmarks, common mistakes, and honest tradeoffs.

item.description: Unlock faster query times and boost database performance by mastering indexing techniques and best practices.

item.description: A practical guide to Password Security: What Actually Works in 2026 covering implementation, real performance benchmarks, common mistakes, and honest tradeoffs.

item.title: Red Flags That Sink Tech Jobs
item.description: Uncover critical interview red flags that can derail tech job opportunities. Gain insights to navigate pitfalls and secure your dream position.

item.description: A practical guide to How Hospitals Are Using AI to Save Lives covering implementation, real performance benchmarks, common mistakes, and honest tradeoffs.

item.title: AI on a Budget
item.description: Replace pricey software with 10 affordable AI tools, saving you money and boosting productivity.

item.title: Reliable By Design
item.description: Master Site Reliability Engineering principles to boost system uptime and performance.

item.title: Digital Doubles
item.description: Unlock industry insights with Digital Twin Technology, exploring its applications and benefits in real-world scenarios.

item.title: Decoding Others' Code
item.description: Unlock the secrets of code comprehension! This guide reveals techniques to analyze, interpret, and effectively navigate other programmers' code with ease.

item.description: A practical guide to Multi-Modal AI: When Models See, Hear, and Read covering implementation, real performance benchmarks, common mistakes, and honest tradeoffs.
